title: Adopt platform-ci reusable semantic release workflow
description: Refactor Virtuus release workflow to consume shared reusable semantic-release workflow in platform-ci. Keep project-specific publish steps in wrapper workflow. Validate config consistency with protected main branch rules and anthusbot auth path.

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Starting work to standardize semantic-release with platform-ci reusable workflow shared by Virtuus and Tactus. Steps: define reusable contract in platform-ci, migrate wrappers in both repos, validate YAML and release-path parity.

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Implemented Virtuus migration to shared reusable semantic-release workflow in platform-ci. release job now calls reusable workflow with workflow_run head SHA + main branch, and project-specific publish steps moved to separate publish-artifacts job gated by needs.release.outputs.released. Validated workflow YAML parse.
